---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

 
# Read in data and packages
```{r}
library(tidyverse)


product <- read.csv("C:/Users/brick/OneDrive/Documents/saga/blog/quadrant_chart_example/digital_product_enhancements.csv")

colnames(product)
```

# Plot
```{r}
library(ggrepel)
library(MetBrewer)

quad <- product |> 
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = engineering_effort,
      y = impact_score
      )
    ) +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = project_name,
                      color = category)) +
  geom_point(
    aes(size = design_effort,
        color = category),
    show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 5,
             color = "white") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 5,
             color = "white") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,10), 
                     breaks = seq(0,10,1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,10), 
                     breaks = seq(0,10,1)) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 14)) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(label = sort(unique(product$category)), size = 6))
    ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
  "Checkout"   = "#eba487",
  "Navigation" = "#9cec86",
  "Loyalty"    = "#86cfec",
  "Security"   = "#d686ec")
  ) +
  labs(
    color = "Project Category: "
  ) +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#1a1c2e", color = NA),
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "#1a1c2e", color = NA),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x.top = element_line(color = "white"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "white"),          # otherwise invisible on black
    axis.title = element_text(color = "white"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#1a1c2e", color = NA),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#1a1c2e", color = NA),
    legend.text = element_blank(),                      # hide the plain-text label...
    legend.title = element_text(color = "white", 
                                size = 18)                       # ...since override.aes now shows the colored word instead
  )
    

quad

```
